signals.headline: XRP SEC Commodity Status Confirmed March 17, CLARITY Act Markup Expected Late April | NO | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP SEC Commodity Status Confirmed March 17, CLARITY Act Markup Expected Late April | NO | MED confidence**  
SEC confirmed XRP's commodity status on March 17 (not new), with CLARITY Act markup anticipated later in April as a potential catalyst, but no fresh confirmations today; XRP trades near $1.32-1.35.[2][3]

signals.headline: CME Group Confirms Regulated SUI Futures Launch on May 4 | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
CME Group Confirms Regulated SUI Futures Launch on May 4 | NO | HIGH confidence**  
CME announced futures for SUI (not Solana, XRP, or Ethereum) starting May 4, boosting SUI 7.6% but unrelated to queried assets; mentions tokenization partnerships involve Ethereum and Solana indirectly via Securitize and Nasdaq-listed Currency Group.[3]

signals.headline: Solana Alpenglow Upgrade Passes Governance Vote with 98
signals.raw:
Solana Alpenglow Upgrade Passes Governance Vote with 98.27% Approval | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Alpenglow upgrade, aiming to reduce Solana transaction finality to 100-150 milliseconds, secured overwhelming support in a recent governance vote, positioning Solana as a top high-speed blockchain amid its current $75-80 price range.[2]

signals.headline: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, XRP ETFs Show Mixed Flows in Early April | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, XRP ETFs Show Mixed Flows in Early April | NO | HIGH confidence**  
ETFs recorded volatile inflows/outflows through April 2 (e.g., Solana ETF: $6.2M outflow March 30, $0.9M inflow April 2; similar for others), indicating shifting sentiment but no major net positive resolution.[4]
